transcript.text: This recognition returns a formatted string of one continuous term. No pauses, no sentences, no structure. During a live conversation, this becomes an undedeveloped wall of text on the screen.

transcript.text: First layer, Temporal segmentation. When the speaker pauses for longer than 1.1 seconds, we can treat that as any motorance, which is a breadth between thoughts or different speakers.

segments.text: First layer, Temporal segmentation.
When the speaker pauses for longer than 1.1 seconds, we can treat that as any motorance,
which is a breadth between thoughts or different speakers.

transcript.text: Second layer, gramatical splitting, abbreviation likes doctor, an example, strain tag. So we can only break on real sentence boundaries. One utterance in and clean sentence, step out.
